name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: The How-to guide now explains all 9 entry types: Regular Deposit, Regular Withdrawal, Unclaimed Credit, Transfer, Store, Mistake, Rental, Adjust and Other.
It includes an overview chart plus a worked money example for every type, showing exactly what each one does to its own total and to a bank if you pick one.
As always, available in English, 中文 (Chinese) and ភាសាខ្មែរ (Khmer).
